iteration1.notes: Baseline with original verbose skill. regex-replace lost 5pts on var-replacement (const valid instead of let valid).

iteration2.notes: Optimized SKILL.md: trimmed to JS/TS focus, added log parsing pattern, code refactoring guidance. Same var-replacement issue.

iteration3.notes: Strengthened const/let instruction too aggressively. Model got confused and failed to create output file (looping on read).

iteration4.notes: Toned down instruction. Model still got stuck in tool call loop (gemini-3-flash variance).

iteration5.notes: Same skill as iteration 4. Stable scores confirm 95+100 is the reliable performance level.

changes: Trimmed skill from 472 lines to ~100 lines, focusing on JS/TS and Python only
Removed Go, command-line, and validation pattern sections not relevant to tasks
Added explicit log parsing section with Python regex pattern for structured log extraction
Added code refactoring guidance with emphasis on following exact const/let specifications
Added edge case handling tips: query string stripping, escaped quotes, special characters
